issues: Stage-A 的核心前提錯誤:聲稱機器資料『無 forwardEps/估計欄位』,故手動以 CEO『well over $5』口語指引捏造 forward_eps=5.30。實際上機器校正資料 (_calib_raw.json) 已含完整共識:forwardEps=6.17263 (=eps_+1y_avg, FY2028 錨)、eps_0y_avg=4.04749 (FY2027)、rev_+1y_avg=16.68B。應直接採機器共識。
forward_eps 偏低:5.30 vs 機器共識 6.17,低約 14%。成長股不應人為砍到低於共識。已上修至 6.17。
Stage-A 算錯隱含倍數:它用過低的 5.30 算出 forward P/E≈53x 並據此判定『偏高』。以正確 6.17 計算,現價隱含 forward P/E=45.15x (與機器 forwardPE 45.59 一致),落在 wide 帶 [17.1..76.0] 上中段,亦低於 standard 帶上緣 49.8。
成長率讀數錯誤:Stage-A 以錯誤 EPS 得 FY27->FY28 EPS 成長僅 31%,故只給強成長帶 28-40。以機器共識 (4.05->6.17) 實際成長為 52.5%,屬 >40% 超高成長帶,支持更高倍數。
fair_multiple=38 偏低:在 52% 超高成長且現價隱含 45x 的情境下,38 把現價推向偏貴邊緣略嫌保守。上修至 42 (強/超高成長交界、且貼近隱含 45x)。
forward_revenue 16.5B 與機器 16.68B 接近,已對齊機器值 16.678B。
target_year=2027 (FY2028=calendar 2027)、currency=USD、shares=874.8M 數量級皆正確,予以保留。
final_note: 不予核可 (approved=false),改用機器共識調和。最關鍵錯誤:Stage-A 誤判機器無共識欄位而手動捏造前瞻 EPS,但 _calib_raw.json 已含 forwardEps=6.17 (FY2028)、eps_0y=4.05 (FY2027)、rev_+1y=16.68B。修正後:forward_eps=6.17、forward_revenue=16.68B,現價隱含 forward P/E=45.15x (= 機器 forwardPE 45.59),FY27->FY28 EPS 真實成長 52.5% (超高成長)。據此將 fair_multiple 由 38 上修至 42,method=pe_band、band_shape=wide 保留。expected_region=expensive (45.15 高於 fair 42,但仍遠低於 wide 帶 euphoria 上緣 76)。confidence 可維持 medium。

That is implausible for a name with current PER 32 and historical PER range 7.6-65, and proves the FY2027 anchor is too high/too far-dated.

Quarterly EPS split and the 71.65 / 57-58 consensus figures are NOT in the machine file (.cache/TW_3324.json contains only header fields, price_history, per_history; shares=null, revenue_ttm=null). They are web-sourced and unverifiable from machine data; the trailing run-rate (~34.66) is the only machine-anchored figure.
target_year should be 2026, not 2027 (use the next-resolving fiscal year, not a 2-years-forward projection that inflates the EPS base).
forward_revenue/ps_band not possible: revenue_ttm and shares are both null in machine data, so pe_band is correctly retained.

Sanity check on corrected values: implied = 1110/50 = 22.2x, inside wide band [13.5x..60x], lower-middle => 'fair'; 30x * FY2026 EPS ~50 = ~1500 fair value, broadly consistent with cited analyst targets (cnyes 1425, UBS PT 1380).
final_note: Reject Stage-A as written. Method (pe_band), fair_multiple (30x), and band_shape (wide) are sound and retained: 3324 is solidly profitable with a real PER history (current 32, range 7.6-65) and extreme volatility (price 117->1280), so pe_band + wide is appropriate. The defect is the forward anchor: Stage-A reaches out to FY2027 EPS 71.65 (target_year 2027), which is 2x trailing run-rate and makes the implied current multiple collapse to 15.5x -> 'cheap' on a near-record-high stock, which is incoherent. Per the correct-back-to-machine-run-rate bias, I pull the anchor in to FY2026 (forward_eps ~50, target_year 2026), giving implied 22.2x and an 'expected_region' of 'fair'. Confidence on the corrected forward EPS is only moderate because no quarterly/forward/consensus data exists in the machine file - all EPS-projection inputs are external.
